app.title: PathLab
app.heroText: Build walls, compare algorithms, and watch how a search moves from start to target.

onboarding.title: Ready to explore?
onboarding.text: Draw the walls and start the path algorithm as soon as you want.
steps: Choose BFS, DFS, Dijkstra or A*

status.initial: Draw walls, choose an algorithm, then run the visualization.
status.reset: Grid reset. Ready for a new visualization.

tip.title: Beginner tip
tip.text: Start with BFS, draw a few walls, then compare the behavior with DFS.

bfs.name: BFS
bfs.description: Explores layer by layer and guarantees the shortest path on an unweighted grid.

dfs.name: DFS
dfs.description: Goes deep into one direction first. It is useful to understand search behavior, but not always shortest.

dijkstra.name: Dijkstra
dijkstra.description: Finds the shortest path by expanding the cheapest known cells first.

astar.name: A*
astar.description: Uses a heuristic to search toward the target more directly.
